flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Glenville State University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (68.3% → 55.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Glenville State University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (37.9% → 33.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Glenville State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Glenville State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (30.5% → 34.1%).
